emails.body:
MLOps Weekly Digest #1

Top stories this week:

• Model drift detection in production: new open-source tools from the LF AI & Data Foundation
• Kubernetes 1.30 adds native support for GPU resource slicing — relevant for inference workloads
• DVC 3.4 release: improved pipeline caching for large dataset versioning
• Paper highlight: "Continuous Evaluation of ML Models in DoD Environments" (arXiv:2609.04211)

Upcoming events:
- MLOps Community Meetup (virtual) — Oct 2
- KubeCon + CloudNativeCon NA — Nov 12-15, Salt Lake City

Quick tip: Use `dvc exp run --queue` to parallelize hyperparameter sweeps across your compute pool.

---
MLOps Weekly | Curated by NEWS-006 Editorial
Unsubscribe: newsletters.example/unsubscribe/NEWS-006

MLOps Weekly Digest #2

Top stories this week:

• MLflow 2.16 introduces model registry webhooks for automated staging promotion
• New NIST AI RMF playbook for government ML system authorizations (Draft SP 800-218A)
• Hugging Face TGI 2.3: speculative decoding support cuts LLM latency ~30%
• Case study: USAF Kessel Run's feature store migration — lessons learned

Tooling updates:
- Evidently AI 0.6: new data quality test suites for tabular + text
- BentoML 1.3: multi-model service composition patterns
- Weights & Biases: artifact lineage graph now in public beta

Job board: 3 new MLOps engineer roles at DIU, CDAO, and AFRL.

---
MLOps Weekly | Curated by NEWS-006 Editorial
